_comment: Simple demo: 3 blocks in series, 2 parallel strings per block, 10 cells in series per string. Each tile is tagged with its block + string, so the same file describes BOTH the physical placement and the electrical circuit. Cell optics are referenced from data/cells/<cell_type>.json (only the cell's alpha); rear/bare optics come from the substrate at solve time.
name: 3 blocks x 2 parallel x 10 series
layout: B1S1 B1S1 B1S1 B1S1 B1S1 B1S1 B1S1 B1S1 B1S1 B1S1 B2S1 B2S1 B2S1 B2S1 B2S1 B2S1 B2S1 B2S1 B2S1 B2S1 B3S1 B3S1 B3S1 B3S1 B3S1 B3S1 B3S1 B3S1 B3S1 B3S1
B1S2 B1S2 B1S2 B1S2 B1S2 B1S2 B1S2 B1S2 B1S2 B1S2 B2S2 B2S2 B2S2 B2S2 B2S2 B2S2 B2S2 B2S2 B2S2 B2S2 B3S2 B3S2 B3S2 B3S2 B3S2 B3S2 B3S2 B3S2 B3S2 B3S2
